Title I and III funds are from the Standardized Account Code Structure Data Viewer, Budget - July 1 Estimates, 2023-2024, 2024-2025. These federal funds fund schools serving high percentages of low-income families. Title I and III budget data are from 2023-2024 except where data are missing in which case they are supplemented by data from 2024-2025. [Show less]
